_comment_session_storage: Session storage directory - high I/O, consider fast storage (SSD)
_comment_application_organization: Identity of THIS install (#617). The org JSON-LD file at <storagedir>/<file> is the single source of truth — name, url, address, etc. live IN THE FILE, not in config. Install completion tracked via INSTANCE_DATA_FOLDER/.install-complete (not config).
_comment_application_persons: Person records storage (#617). One file per person under storagedir.
_comment_application_roles: OrganizationRole records storage (#617 follow-up). One file per (organization, namedPosition) pair under storagedir, named <namedPosition>.json. Snapshot at create time from the catalog at ngdpbase.roles.definitions.
_comment_page_index: Page index file - used by VersioningFileProvider for fast lookups (high I/O, consider fast storage)
_comment_page_chrome: Pages excluded from tab injection or footer rendering
_comment_legacy_database_files: LEGACY: These properties are not used in code - kept for reference only
_comment_user_storage: User authentication and storage configuration (ALL LOWERCASE)
_comment_auth: Authentication provider chain — ngdpbase.auth.required-factors is an ordered list of provider IDs that must be satisfied for login (e.g. ['password'] or ['password','totp'] for MFA)
_comment_mail: Email transport — used by magic-link auth, notifications, and server alerts. See docs/admin/email-setup.md
_comment_mail_smtp: SMTP settings (provider='smtp'). Works with any relay: Gmail, Resend, SendGrid, SES, self-hosted. smtp.from overrides mail.from and allows display names.
_comment_magic_link: Magic link (passwordless) authentication — requires ngdpbase.mail.enabled:true and provider:smtp
_comment_google_oidc: Google OIDC ('Sign in with Google') — see jwilleke/ngdpbase#447. Set credentials in app-custom-config.json (never commit secrets).
_comment_password_auth: Password (local) authentication — set false to hide the password form when Google OIDC is the only desired login method
_comment_user_external: Default isExternal for newly provisioned users. false = local account with password. OIDC auto-provision overrides to true.
_comment_theme: Theme settings — ngdpbase.theme.active is the folder name under themes/; ngdpbase.theme.defaults.mode is the default light/dark mode for new users
_comment_directories: LEGACY: Directory settings - use provider-specific configs instead (e.g., ngdpbase.page.provider.filesystem.storagedir)
_comment_addons: Add-on system configuration - individual add-ons configured under ngdpbase.addons.<name>
_comment_markup_render_tags: Fenced code block language tags the system recognises. Tags not in this list are flagged as unknown on page save. 'wiki' is intentionally absent — it has no special meaning here.

GVP-COUNTRY.description: GVP (Global Volcanism Program) — Volcanoes by Country

ngdpbase.features.maintenance.message: System is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.
_comment_search_legacy: Legacy search settings (moved to provider-specific config above)
_comment_logging: Logging configuration (see Issue #169 for LoggingProvider pattern)
_comment_audit_legacy: Legacy audit settings (moved to provider-specific config above)
_comment_system_category: System category definitions with storage location mapping

developer.label: developer
developer.description: Developer documentation and technical note Only in GitHub

addon.label: addon
addon.description: Pages seeded by an installed add-on

_comment_system_keywords: System keyword definitions for controlled vocabulary (operator-curated; subject + workflow terms)

general.label: general
general.description: General-purpose keyword for standard wiki content

_comment_catalog_ai: AI-based term suggestion (Phase 4 — requires an LLM addon to activate)
_comment_user_keywords: User keyword definitions for flexible content tagging (user-invented tags; draft/review/published/subject terms are deprecated here — see system-keywords)

default.label: default
default.description: Default keyword with no special restrictions

private.label: private
private.description: Private content editable only by creator and admins

_comment_timezones: Available timezone options for user preferences

2025-01-01.name: New Year's Day
2025-01-01.message: Access restricted on New Year's Day

*-01-01.name: New Year's Day
*-01-01.message: Access restricted on New Year's Day

weekend-support.name: Weekend Support
weekend-support.description: Limited weekend access for critical issues

default.name: Default Schedule
default.description: Fallback schedule for users without specific assignments

_comment_user_coreFields: Fields owned by the core platform on user records. Any field NOT in this list is treated as an extended/addon field and rendered read-only in the admin user edit page.
_comment_permissions: Canonical permission registry. Format: {target}-{action}. Target-first, hyphen-separated (URL-safe, matches the 'permissions' array in role definitions). Each entry: description, icon (Font Awesome name), color (hex). The key itself is the permission name.
_comment_roles: Role definitions - metadata only, permissions defined via policies below (ALL LOWERCASE)

admin.name: admin
admin.description: Full system access to all features

user-admin.name: user-admin
user-admin.description: Can manage users — create, edit, deactivate, delete

editor.name: editor
editor.description: Can create, edit, delete, and rename pages

member.name: member
member.description: Community member — same read access as reader, placeholder for community-specific permissions

_comment_access_policies: Access control policies - Role-based with specific action permissions

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Administrator Full Access
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Full system access for administrators - all page and admin permissions

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: User Administrator Permissions
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Can manage users — create, edit, deactivate, delete

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Editor Permissions
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Can create, edit, delete, and rename pages plus manage assets

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Contributor Permissions
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Can create and edit pages, upload assets (no delete/rename)

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Reader Permissions
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Read-only access - can view pages and assets, search, and export

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Anonymous Read Access
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Anonymous users can only read pages

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Deny Anonymous System Pages
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Block anonymous access to system and admin category pages

ngdpbase.access.policies.name: Default View Access for All
ngdpbase.access.policies.description: Fallback - all authenticated users can at minimum view pages

_comment_otlp: OTLP HTTP push-based metric export to a remote OpenTelemetry collector
_comment_backup: Backup and restore configuration (see Issue #170 for BackupProvider pattern)
_comment_media: MediaManager configuration (Issue #273). Media scanning/indexing of external photo/video libraries.
